score_evidence.completeness: All 6 required fields present: contractor_pricing_source (3 local BCS hospitality contractors + benchmark), contractor_total (105,000,000 MXN), client_budget (60,200,000 MXN), variance_amount (44,800,000 MXN), variance_pct (74.4%), recommendation (escalate_to_marcela). decision_commentary: Budget alignment correctly identifies and quantifies the 74.4% gap between MXN 105M contractor estimate and MXN 60.2M client budget. Escalation to Marcela is the correct recommendation given the severity. Three options provided but without estimated savings per option — reduces clarity and decision readiness slightly. Marcela resolved this at DG-09 (client confirmed expanded budget to $6.1M USD). State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No auto-fail conditions triggered (source documented, recommendation present).
